content:
ty. it is fixed now and new release was created: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-focil%40v0.1.0

note that `ethereum/hive` does not have your mapper update which would lead to failing tests, so i updated our [instructions](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/issues/3007) to make use of my hive fork
